TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Alolong, title = Alolong, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alolong} }

S.FORM: == Alolong == Itiniay i Guangfu Siang no Hualien (ŤäĪŤďģÁł£, Kalingko) ko Alolong a niyaro', 18 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 58 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 53 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 5 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 90%, roma 2%. Talihafan
S.PHON: == a…ĺo~u…ĺo~uŇč == itiniaj i *o~u~uaŇčfo~u~u siaŇč no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn (***, ka…ĺiŇčko~u) ko~u a…ĺo~u…ĺo~uŇč a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u °amis **%, ro~uma *%. ta…ĺińßafan
S.FORM: == Alolong == Itiniay i Guangfu Siang no Hualien (ŤäĪŤďģÁł£, Kalingko) ko Alolong a niyaro', 18 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 58 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 53 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 5 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 90%, roma 2%. Talihafan
